jobs.job_title: Contract - Full Stack Developer (Java/Oracle application to a Python-based cloud-native platform Migration)
jobs.job_description:
Role: Full Stack Java/Python Developer

Location: Remotely from Hyderabad or Bangalore

Shift Hours: 1:30 PM to 10:30 PM IST.

Immediate joiners only - must be able to start within 2 weeks.

We are currently seeking a highly skilled Full Stack Java & Python Developer with at least 8+ years of experience to lead the modernization of a critical enterprise application for our healthcare client in the US.

Position Summary

This role will be responsible for reengineering an existing Java-based application with an Oracle database into a modern, scalable Python-based solution utilizing Google BigQuery, hosted on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). The ideal candidate will possess strong full-stack development expertise, cloud-native architecture experience, and a proven track record of application migration and modernization initiatives.

Key Deliverables
• Successful migration of the Java/Oracle application to a Python-based cloud-native platform.
• Conversion and optimization of database workloads from Oracle to BigQuery.
• Deployment of the modernized solution on Google Cloud Platform.
• Comprehensive testing, performance validation, and documentation.
• Scalable, maintainable, and secure application architecture aligned with enterprise standards

Required Qualifications
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field.
• 5+ years of experience in full-stack application development.
• Strong proficiency in Java and Python programming languages.
• Experience modernizing or migrating legacy applications to cloud-based architectures.
• Hands-on experience with Oracle Database, including SQL tuning, schema design, and PL/SQL development.
• Strong experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services.
• Experience with Google BigQuery for data modeling, data warehousing, and query optimization.
• Experience developing REST APIs and microservices architectures.
• Proficiency with front-end technologies such as Angular, React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
• Experience with containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
• Knowledge of DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
• Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.

Description and Requirements

"At BMC trust is not just a word - it's a way of life!" Hybrid

Description and Requirements

BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.

The IZOT product line includes BMC’s Intelligent Z Optimization & Transformation products, which help the world’s largest companies to monitor and manage their mainframe systems. The modernization of mainframe is the beating heart of our product line, and we achieve this goal by developing products that improve the developer experience, the mainframe integration, the speed of application development, the quality of the code and the applications’ security, while reducing operational costs and risks. We acquired several companies along the way, and we continue to grow, innovate, and perfect our solutions on an ongoing basis.

BMC is seeking an enthusiastic and dynamic Full Stack Developer to join the IMS Data Management R&D team. In this role, you will be responsible for development and maintenance of software products under the guidance of experts.

The IZOT IMS Data Management R&D team is involved in the development and maintenance of world class solutions that help the biggest global organizations across all major domains in efficiently managing their IMS environment which hold humongous amounts of data and manage their workloads to keep their business applications available, scalable, and reliable.

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Product Developer to join our team. We are looking for a developer who can think big and apply the design thinking process to tackle longstanding challenges in delivering simple, elegant solutions to complex, technology-focused needs for large organizations. The role requires a good knowledge of product domain, the Agile software development methodology and the process involved in product development and maintenance.

Here is how, through this exciting role, YOU will contribute to BMC's and your own success:

In This Role, You Will

• Drive user-centered design solutions that deliver value and improve experiences to millions of users
• Employ innovative and effective strategies to solve user interaction challenges that push creative boundaries
• Create and maintain vision and design specifications, wire frames and interactive prototypes
• Use design and analysis tools to define problem statements and drive solutions
• Work closely with cross-functional/multi-disciplinary teams including visual designers, researchers, software architects, developers, and product managers to iteratively design concepts and interactions for our products.
• Interact with customers and end users to better understand their needs and translating those needs into innovative solutions
• Need to manage a mixed workload of multiple ongoing tasks including new function development and product maintenance.

To ensure you’re set up for success, you will bring the following skillset & experience:

• 3+ years of experience designing interactive user experiences for technology products that serve med-large customer bases
• Experience in front-end development technologies (JavaScript, HTML5, CSS, Bootstrap)
• Experience with Angular 2+ version is a must
• Solid hands-on technical skills in Core Java and multi-threading
• Problem solving using data structures and algorithms
• Strong Object Oriented application design and development
• Strong knowledge and experience with various DBMS (SQL Server, Oracle, DB2)
• Experience with Jira/Agile development and source code management tools like GIT or ISPW
• Expertise / familiarity in developing various type of scripts for effective use of popular test automation and DevOps tools like Jenkins, Selenium, RFT, UFT etc
• Understanding of UX design standards and best practices.
• Proficiency prototyping interactive designs using a variety of design tools and technologies
• Strong analytical, communication and interpersonal skills.
• Strong understanding and working knowledge of the software development process.

Whilst these are nice to have, our team can help you develop in the following skills:

• Understanding of AI/ML, Gen AI technologies
• Exposure to IT Service Management, ITIL, and operations within Enterprise IT support teams.

CA-DNP

Our commitment to you!

BMC’s culture is built around its people. We have 6000+ brilliant minds working together across the globe. You won’t be known just by your employee number, but for your true authentic self. BMC lets you be YOU!

If after reading the above, You’re unsure if you meet the qualifications of this role but are deeply excited about BMC and this team, we still encourage you to apply! We want to attract talents from diverse backgrounds and experience to ensure we face the world together with the best ideas!

BMC is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status as a protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.

BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.

At BMC we believe in pay transparency and have set the midpoint of the salary band for this role at 1,737,400 INR. Actual salaries depend on a wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions, including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training, licensure, and certifications; and other business and organizational needs.

The salary listed is just one component of BMC's employee compensation package. Other rewards may include a variable plan and country specific benefits.

We are committed to ensuring that our employees are paid fairly and equitably, and that we are transparent about our compensation practices.

(Returnship@BMC)

Had a break in your career? No worries. This role is eligible for candidates who have taken a break in their career and want to re-enter the workforce. If your expertise matches the above job, visit to https://bmcrecruit.avature.net/returnship know more and how to apply.

We are looking for highly skilled Full Stack Engineers with expertise in Angular and a strong preference for C#.

Location: Bangalore

Experience: 8 - 10 years

Availability: Immediate Joining

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop, test, and maintain full-stack applications using Angular and C# (mandatory).
• Design and implement front-end solutions with responsive UI/UX.
• Build and optimize back-end APIs and services.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features.
• Ensure application performance, security, and scalability.
• Debug, troubleshoot, and enhance existing applications.
• Follow best coding practices and maintain code documentation.
• Responsible for design, development, and hands-on implementation of Microsoft Azure cloud solutions using Angular and C#.
• Participate in planning and implementation of solutions for our cloud platform
• Align solutions with standards and best practices working with cross-functional engineering and consulting teams.

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• 8 years’ experience with Angular web development framework and C# (mandatory).
• Proficiency in C# and advanced topics, .NET Framework & .NET Core is highly preferred.
• Experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
• Knowledge of RESTful APIs, Web Services, and Database Management.
• Experience in Agile development methodologies.
• Experience with Industrial automation domain knowledge
• Knowledge of working Microsoft Azure Platform, including deployment, provisioning, and high availability of Web Applications
• Experience on debugging, diagnostics and Unit Testing
• Excellent analytical skills, Open, proactive, results oriented, self-organized and self-motivated.
• Professional and precise communication skills

## Who we are

VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology & Transformation.
As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry-first model which brings together the best of in-house and 3rd party capability.
We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
#VOIS #BeUnrivalled #CreateTheFuture

## About this Role

We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Developer with 5–6 years of experience who is proficient in modern backend and frontend technologies, including AWS, Kafka, Java, Spring Boot, and React. The role involves working on scalable applications, contributing to system design, and delivering robust solutions using microservices and cloud-based architectures while collaborating with cross-functional teams.

## What you’ll do

###

* Develop, enhance, and maintain full stack applications using Java, Spring Boot, and React.
* Design and implement microservices and REST/SOAP-based web services.
* Work with AWS services to build scalable and efficient solutions.
* Implement and manage messaging solutions using Kafka.
* Write, debug, and maintain React unit test cases to ensure application quality.
* Collaborate with teams to analyse business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
* Manage code repositories and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub and Jenkins.
* Perform database design, development, and optimisation using SQL.
* Work in Unix/Ubuntu-based environments for development and deployment activities.
* Monitor and troubleshoot applications using tools such as Kibana and Elasticsearch where applicable.

## Who you are

* Experienced in Java 8, Spring Boot, and modern full stack development practices.
* Proficient in React, including testing frameworks and debugging techniques.
* Familiar with AWS cloud services and event-driven architecture using Kafka.
* Knowledgeable in REST and SOAP web services development.
* Comfortable working in Ubuntu/Linux-based environments.
* Strong analytical and data interpretation skills with hands-on experience in SQL.
* Able to understand complex business processes and translate them into application requirements.
* Exposure to tools and technologies such as Oracle PL/SQL, Liquibase, Docker, Kubernetes, Elasticsearch, PostgreSQL, and Grafana is advantageous.

## Not a perfect fit?

Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

## What's in it for you

* Opportunity to work on cutting-edge cloud and microservices-based architectures.
* Exposure to large-scale enterprise systems and global projects.
* Collaborative and inclusive work environment with cross-functional teams.
* Continuous learning and development opportunities in emerging technologies.

## What skills you will learn

* Advanced cloud-native application development on AWS.
* Scalable system design using event-driven architecture and Kafka.
* Frontend testing and performance optimisation in React.
* DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines and containerisation.
* Observability and monitoring using modern tools such as Kibana and Elasticsearch.

## VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment

Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio-economic background.

## Join Us

At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

## Alert

Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
#JDEnhancedByTARA

## Follow us on social media

* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

.Net Full Stack Developer- 4-7 Years-Bangalore

Summary -
We are looking for a skilled .Net Full Stack Developer with 4-7 years of experience in building scalable web applications using React/Angular, TypeScript, C#/.NET or Python, and SQL Server. If you enjoy working across the full software development lifecycle and delivering high-quality solutions, this opportunity is for you.

Location:- Bangalore

Your Future Employer -
Our client is a leading global technology organization delivering innovative digital solutions for enterprise clients. The company offers a collaborative work environment, exposure to modern technologies, and excellent career growth opportunities.

Responsibilities -


• Develop and maintain full-stack web applications using React/Angular and C#/.NET or Python.

• Build responsive front-end applications using TypeScript.

• Design, develop, and optimize SQL Server databases.

• Participate in the complete Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), from analysis to deployment.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and high-quality applications.

• Manage source code using Git and troubleshoot application issues.


Requirements -


• 4-7 years of experience in Full Stack Development.

• Strong expertise in React or Angular with TypeScript.

• Hands-on experience with C#/.NET Framework or Python.

• Experience with SQL Server and Git.

• Good understanding of SDLC and software development best practices.

• Experience with Docker and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) will be an added advantage.


What is in it for you -


• Opportunity to work on enterprise-scale applications using modern technologies.

• Exposure to cloud platforms and end-to-end software development.

• Competitive compensation and excellent career growth.

• Collaborative and innovation-driven work environment.


Reach Us -
If you think this role is aligned with your career, kindly write me an email along with your updated CV on preeti.kanojiya@crescendogroup.in for a confidential discussion on the role.

Disclaimer -
Crescendo Global specializes in Senior to C-level niche recruitment. We are passionate about empowering job seekers and employers with an engaging memorable job search and leadership hiring experience. Crescendo Global does not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status or disability status.

Note -
We receive many applications daily, so it becomes difficult for us to get back to each candidate. Please assume that your profile has not been shortlisted in case you don't hear back from us in 1 week. Your patience is highly appreciated.

Scammers can misuse Crescendo Global's name for fake job offers. We never ask for money, purchases, or system upgrades. Verify all opportunities at www.crescendo-global.com and report fraud immediately. Stay alert!

Keywords -
Full Stack Developer, React, Angular, TypeScript, C#, .NET Framework, Python, SQL Server, Git, Docker, AWS, Azure, GCP, SDLC, Web Development, REST APIs, Cloud, Software Engineer

Job Description: Full Stack Engineer (Java & Angular)

· Role: Full Stack Engineer

· Job Location: Bangalore

· Word Mode: Hybrid

· Experience: 4+ years

About the Role

We are seeking a Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of hands on experience developing cloud ready applications using Java, Spring Boot, Python-based microservices, and modern front-end frameworks using Angular. The ideal candidate will contribute to both backend microservices and GUI development for web and mobile views, while working with RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and maintain backend microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and Python.

- Build responsive, user-friendly UIs using Angular 18, CSS, HTML, and JavaScript.

- Design and consume RESTful APIs for web and mobile interfaces.

- Implement database interactions with PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

- Assist in cloud deployments and CI/CD workflows.

- Collaborate with senior engineers on architecture, testing, and performance optimization.

Technical Skills Required

- 4+ years of hands-on full stack development experience.

- Strong programming fundamentals in Java (must have) and Python (good to have).

- Experience building microservices using Spring Boot and Python frameworks.

- Angular (must have) experience for web and mobile responsive UIs.

- Strong knowledge of JavaScript, CSS, HTML5.

- RESTful API design and consumption.

- Database knowledge: PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

- Understanding of docker and cloud concepts and native Kubernetes commands

- Working know how Git, CI/CD , and container fundamentals (Docker commands).

Additional Preferred Skills

- Exposure to unit testing frameworks (JUnit, PyTest).

- Basic understanding of Kubernetes and container orchestration concepts.

- Understanding of API security, authentication, and authorization standards.

- Familiarity with Agile methodologies.

- Willingness to learn DevOps practices and cloud-native design.

Soft Skills

- Strong problem solving and analytical ability.

- Good communication and teamwork skills.

- Ability to adapt quickly and learn new technologies.

- Attention to detail and willingness to write clean, maintainable code.

Integers.Ai is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

jobs.job_title: Full Stack Engineer | C# | .NET | React | TypeScript | Noida
jobs.job_description:
🔥 Senior / Lead Full Stack Engineer (C# + .NET + React) | Noida | Delhi Immediate Hiring

🚀 We're AgileEngine – 1000+ Engineers Strong!

AgileEngine is an award-winning software engineering and AI services company partnering with some of the world's leading technology companies and Fortune 500 enterprises to build high-impact digital products.

🚀 Fast-Track Interviews | Build Enterprise SaaS Platforms

We're hiring an experienced Senior / Lead Full Stack Engineer to design, build, and scale enterprise SaaS platforms for a global technology organization.

📍 Location: Noida (Work from Office – Mandatory)
Candidates must be based in Noida or nearby cities, or be willing to relocate before joining.

---

⚙️ Skills Required

- .NET
- React.js
- C#
- TypeScript

---

✅ Must-Have Skills

- 6+ years of professional software development experience
- Strong backend/API development expertise using .NET (C#) & SQL
- Commercial experience with React.js (preferred), Angular, or Vue.js
- Strong knowledge of TypeScript & Modern JavaScript (ES6+)
- Experience designing and consuming REST & GraphQL APIs
- Experience with GitHub Copilot or similar AI developer tools
- AI-assisted engineering mindset with experience leveraging AI to improve software delivery and developer productivity
- Experience writing Unit, Integration & UI Automated Tests
- Strong understanding of Clean Code, SOLID Principles & Design Patterns
- Experience building Distributed, Cloud-Native Applications
- Experience delivering Containerized Solutions (Docker)
- Strong Debugging & Root Cause Analysis skills
- Knowledge of Secure Coding Best Practices
- Excellent English communication skills

---

🚀 Initial Assessment

The first stage of the interview process is a mandatory .NET / React.js coding assessment designed to evaluate your backend and frontend software engineering skills.

⚠️ Please apply only if you are comfortable with hands-on .NET (C#) and React.js development, as this assessment is mandatory and cannot be skipped.

The passing score is 80%, so please complete it carefully.

---

🚨 Mandatory Skills & Crucial Requirements

The following skills MUST be selected while filling the application and MUST be clearly highlighted in your resume:

✅ C# – Must-have

✅ .NET – Must-have

✅ React.js – Must-have

✅ GitHub Copilot (or similar AI developer tools) – Must-have

Candidates missing these mandatory skills in their application or resume may be automatically screened out.

---

⭐ Preferred Skills

- Observability platforms such as DataDog
- CI/CD tools including ArgoCD & Kustomize
- UI Component Libraries (MUI, Radix UI, etc.)
- Web Accessibility (WCAG) knowledge
- Exposure to C++
- Technical leadership and mentoring experience

---

📩 To Apply, Please Share

1. Updated Resume
2. Total Experience
3. Current Location (Noida or nearby cities only)
4. .NET / React.js (or Angular/Vue) / TypeScript / SQL Experience
5. Experience using GitHub Copilot or similar AI developer tools
6. Cloud & Docker Experience
7. Current CTC
8. Expected CTC
9. Notice Period
10. Email ID

⏳ Candidates based in Noida or nearby cities, willing to work from the Noida office, and available to join immediately or within 2–4 weeks will be given preference.

Please do not use LinkedIn Easy Apply. Instead, send the above details here

Fullstack Software Engineer
What you will do
Let’s do this. Let’s change the world. In this vital role you we are seeking a dedicated and motivated Full Stack Software Engineer to join our Global Commercial Digital Innovation team
• Develop and maintain front-end applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks, preferably ReactJS.

• Develop and handle back-end services using languages such as Python or Node.js, leveraging AWS cloud infrastructure.

• Create innovative solutions leveraging the newest technologies.

• Collaborate with the design and product teams to understand user needs and translate them into technical requirements.

• Write clean, efficient, and well-tested code.

• Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback.

• Maintain system uptime and optimal performance

• Learn and adapt to new technologies and industry trends

What we expect of you
We are all different, yet we all use our unique contributions to serve patients. As a Full Stack Software Engineer, you will contribute to the development and maintenance of our web applications by working on both front-end and back-end technologies. This role is ideal for early-career professionals looking to take on challenges in software development.
Basic Qualifications:
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science with 2-6 Years of experience and engineering preferred, other Engineering field is considered.

• Cloud Computing certificate preferred

Preferred Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree with 5-8 years in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.

Must-Have Skills:
• Hands on experience with web development, proficient with HTML, CSS, JavaScript

• Hands on experience with backend development, proficient with SQL/NoSQL database, proficient in Python and SQL

• Ability to learn new technologies quickly. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. Superb communication and teamwork skills.

Good-to-Have Skills:
• Experienced with API integration, serverless, microservices architecture.

• Experience in SQL/NOSQL database, vector database for large language models

• Experience with popular large language models

• Experience with various frameworks like Langchain or llamaIndex for developing applications

• Experience with prompt engineering, model fine tuning

• Experience with DevOps CICD build and deployment pipeline

• Experience with design patterns, data structures, test-driven development.

Soft Skills:
• Excellent analytical and troubleshooting skills.

• Strong verbal and written communication skills

• Ability to work effectively with global, virtual teams

• High degree of initiative and self-motivation.

• Ability to manage multiple priorities successfully.

• Team-oriented, with a focus on achieving team goals

• Strong presentation and public speaking skills.

jobs.job_description:
Req ID: 376411

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward-thinking organization, apply now.

We are currently seeking a Senior .Net full stack developer to join our team in Chennai, Tamil Nādu (IN-TN), India (IN).

Senior .Net Full Stack Developer

Job Description
• Design software systems with various Microsoft technologies such as C#, .NET, Asp. Net, MVC, Dot NET CORE
• Ensure compliance to all architecture requirements.
• Advanced abilities coding in UI technologies such as JavaScript, Typescript, Angular, HTML, Vue.JS
• Experience with WCF, Web API, REST, and multi-tier distributed systems.
• Coordinate with various departments and analyze requirements of architectural team.
• Develop solutions for various components and recommend changes for various customers.
• Design architecture for various different components and validate tools.
• Establish architectural methodology of all deliverables.
• Participate in architectural meetings and analyze all technical requirements for Dot NET applications.
• Monitor application architecture and ensure appropriate implementation of all solutions.
• Review infrastructure with Devops team for any issues and recommend solutions.
• Develop architectural principles and standards for various IT groups.
• Assist enterprise architecture team on all governance activities.
• Evaluate all Dot Net documents and record observation.
• Coordinate with architects and analysts and maintain technical knowledge.
• Should have knowledge on Devops tools and technologies which includes but not limited to Jenkins, Microsoft Azure, chef, Docker, Splunk

Required Experience
• BS degree in Computer Science or related degree
• 10+ years with .NET framework, .NET Core, ASP.NET, C#, MVC, SQL Server, JQuery, WebServices, REST Services
• 8+ years of experience with SQL server
• 2+ years’ experience with Angular 7+

About NTT DATA

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in R&D.

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us.

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

Job Description:

Role: Senior Lead Full Stack Engineer (8+ Years of Experience)

Location: Bangalore

Role Overview

Designs, develops, and operates end-to-end software solutions across frontend and backend systems, combining deep technical expertise with a broad cross-functional understanding of product, platform, and operations. Acts as a T-shaped engineer, bringing strong specialization while contributing effectively across adjacent domains such as DevOps, security, performance, and user experience to maximize product value.

This role requires close collaboration with globally distributed teams across regions and time zones to ensure alignment, consistency, and successful delivery of shared product goals.

Responsibilities

• Design and develop front-end and back-end components within service-based architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.

• Own the end-to-end software lifecycle, from ideation and system design to deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement.

• Apply T-shaped engineering principles, contributing beyond core specialization to areas such as product understanding, UX impact, reliability, and security.

• Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies to enhance architecture, developer productivity, and product capabilities.

• Drive automation across system setup, CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and operational processes in collaboration with DevOps practices.

• Identify system bottlenecks, technical debt, and architectural gaps; lead initiatives for continuous improvement.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Product, UX/UI, QA, DevOps, and Security to deliver high-quality, customer-centric solutions.

• Engage in technical discussions with global stakeholders, contributing to architecture decisions, standards, and best practices.

• Make informed technical decisions by evaluating trade-offs across engineering, product, and operational dimensions.

• Promote engineering excellence by establishing reusable patterns, frameworks, and tooling.

• Conduct code reviews, mentor engineers, and foster a culture of collaboration, ownership, and continuous learning.

Professional Requirements and Expertise

• Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science or related field.

• 8+ years of experience building modern web applications and distributed systems.

• Strong depth in both domain (frontend and backend) with working knowledge across the stack (T-shaped profile).

Technical Skills

Frontend

• TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

• Frameworks: React, Next.js, PrimVue.js

Backend

• Java 17+, Spring Boot

• Strong understanding of software design principles including modular architecture, API design, and microservices.

• Familiarity with Domain-Driven Design (DDD) is a plus.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs and deliver pragmatic, scalable solutions.

Cross-Functional and T-Shaped Expectations

• Working knowledge of:

• Cloud platforms (AWS)

• CI/CD pipelines and deployment strategies

• Monitoring, logging, and observability

• Security fundamentals (authentication, authorization, secure coding)

• Ability to connect technical decisions with business outcomes and user impact.

• Experience or willingness to contribute to:

• Performance optimization

• DevOps practices

• Security improvements

• Test automation

• Platform Architecture

• Strong collaboration skills with multicultural, globally distributed teams.

Tools and Technologies

• Version control: Git

• Build tools: Gradle, Maven

• CI/CD: GitLab CI/CD

• Project tools: Jira, Confluence

Nice to Have

About the Company:

Pace Wisdom Solutions is a deep-tech Product engineering and consulting firm. We have offices in San Francisco, Bengaluru, and Singapore. We specialize in designing and developing bespoke software solutions that cater to solving niche business problems.

We engage with our clients at various stages:

• Right from the idea stage to scope out business requirements.

• Design & architect the right solution and define tangible milestones.

• Setup dedicated and on-demand tech teams for agile delivery.

• Take accountability for successful deployments to ensure efficient go-to-market Implementations.

Pace Wisdom has been working with Fortune 500 Enterprises and growth-stage startups/SMEs since 2012. We also work as an extended Tech team and at times we have played the role of a Virtual CTO too. We believe in building lasting relationships and providing value-add every time.
